economic_notes: Nation has 16 government business enterprises including energy, safety services, contracting, well services, gaming, hospitality, cascade power, utilities, land development, marketplace, and communications entities. GBEs had combined revenue of $28,256,512 and net income of $3,179,172 in 2021. Significant oil and gas royalty income of $20,697,723 from Ottawa Trust. COVID-19 additional funding of $5,194,638 received from ISC. O'Chiese Settlement Trust excluded from consolidation per note 17.
notes: Fiscal year 2021, not 2024. Long-term debt includes both CMHC/TD mortgages ($17,449,025) and FNFA promissory note ($19,738,564) totalling $37,187,589. Federal trust funds of $28,608,829 held by Government of Canada are classified as financial assets on balance sheet. 16 GBEs accounted for on modified equity basis including Jackpot Casino. O'Chiese Settlement Trust (2007 Canada settlement) excluded from consolidation. COVID-19 funding of $5,194,638 included in ISC amounts. Royalty income from Ottawa Trust ($20,697,723) is a significant OSR item. No schedule of remuneration provided in the extracted text. total_government_transfers calculated as ISC ($16,432,533) + CMHC ($154,255) + HRD ($550,986) + FNDF ($277,530) = $17,414,304.
